commands.name: delta
commands.description: Utilities for creating or applying delta packages.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a delta patch from two full releases.

options.name: --mode
options.description:
Set the delta generation mode. [
default: BestSpeed]

options.name: --base
options.description:
The base package for the created
patch.

options.name: --new
options.description:
The resulting package for the created
patch.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The output file path for the created
patch.

commands.name: patch
commands.description: Patch a base package and retrieve the original new package.

options.name: --base
options.description: The base package for the created patch.

options.name: --patch
options.description: The resulting package for the created patch.

options.name: --output
options.description: The output file path for the created patch.

commands.name: download
commands.description: Download's the latest release from a remote update source.

commands.name: az
commands.description: Download latest release from an Azure Blob Storage container.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [
default: Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [
default: linux]

options.name: --account
options.description: Account name

options.name: --key
options.description: Account secret key

options.name: --sas
options.description: Shared access signature token (not the url)

options.name: --container
options.description: Azure container name

options.name: --endpoint
options.description:
Service url (eg.
https://<account-name>.blob.core.windows.net)

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Network timeout in minutes. [default: 30]

commands.name: gitea
commands.description: Download latest release from Gitea repository.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [default:
Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [default:
linux]

options.name: --repoUrl
options.description:
Full url to the gitea repository (eg.
'https://gitea.com/myname/myrepo').

options.name: --token
options.description: OAuth token to use as login credentials.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Network timeout in minutes. [default: 30]

options.name: --pre
options.description: Get latest pre-release instead of stable.

commands.name: github
commands.description: Download latest release from GitHub repository.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [default:
Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [default:
linux]

options.name: --repoUrl
options.description:
Full url to the github repository (eg.
'https://github.com/myname/myrepo').

options.name: --token
options.description: OAuth token to use as login credentials.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Network timeout in minutes. [default: 30]

options.name: --pre
options.description: Get latest pre-release instead of stable.

commands.name: http
commands.description: Download latest release from a HTTP source.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [default:
Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [default:
linux]

options.name: --url
options.description: Url to download remote releases from.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Network timeout in minutes. [default: 30]

commands.name: local
commands.description: Download latest release from a local path or network share.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [default:
Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [default:
linux]

options.name: --path
options.description: Target file path to copy releases to/from.

commands.name: s3
commands.description: Download latest release from an S3 bucket.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [
default: Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [
default: linux]

options.name: --keyId
options.description: Authentication identifier or access key.

options.name: --secret
options.description: Authentication secret key.

options.name: --region
options.description: AWS service region (eg. us-west-1).

options.name: --session
options.description: Authentication session token.

options.name: --endpoint
options.description:
Custom S3-compatible service url (backblaze,
digital ocean, etc).

options.name: --bucket
options.description: Name of the S3 bucket.

options.name: --prefix
options.description: Prefix to the S3 url.

options.name: --disablePathStyle
options.description:
Disable the default of path-style endpoint
and use a subdomain endpoint instead.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Network timeout in minutes. [default: 30]

commands.name: pack
commands.description: Create a Linux .AppImage bundle from application files.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created
packages. [default: Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release.
[default: linux]

options.name: --runtime
options.description:
The target runtime to build packages
for.

options.name: --packId
options.description: Unique Id for application bundle.

options.name: --packVersion
options.description:
Current version for application
bundle.

options.name: --packDir
options.description:
Directory containing application
files for release.

options.name: --localization
options.description:
Path to a folder containing localized
dialog files grouped by culture.
Supports PO and XLIFF formats (for
example 'en/velopack.po',
'fr/velopack.xlf').

options.name: --packAuthors
options.description:
Company name or comma-delimited list
of authors.

options.name: --packTitle
options.description:
Display/friendly name for
application.

options.name: --releaseNotes
options.description:
File with markdown-formatted notes
for this version.

options.name: --delta
options.description:
Disable or set the delta generation
mode. [default: BestSpeed]

options.name: --icon
options.description: Path to icon file for package.

options.name: --mainExe
options.description:
The file name (not path) of the
main/entry executable.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
A regex which excludes matched files
from the package. [default: .*\.pdb]

options.name: --categories
options.description:
Categories from the freedesktop.org
Desktop Menu spec

options.name: --compression
options.description:
Set the compression algorithm to use
for the AppImage [default: gzip]

commands.name: upload
commands.description: Upload local package(s) to a remote update source.

commands.name: az
commands.description: Upload releases to an Azure Blob Storage container.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [
default: Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [
default: linux]

options.name: --account
options.description: Account name

options.name: --key
options.description: Account secret key

options.name: --sas
options.description: Shared access signature token (not the url)

options.name: --container
options.description: Azure container name

options.name: --endpoint
options.description:
Service url (eg.
https://<account-name>.blob.core.windows.ne
t)

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Network timeout in minutes. [default: 30]

options.name: --keepMaxReleases
options.description:
The maximum number of releases to keep in
the container, anything older will be
deleted.

commands.name: gitea
commands.description: Upload releases to a Gitea repository.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [
default: Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [
default: linux]

options.name: --repoUrl
options.description:
Full url to the gitea repository (eg.
'https://gitea.com/myname/myrepo').

options.name: --token
options.description: OAuth token to use as login credentials.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Network timeout in minutes. [default: 30]

options.name: --publish
options.description:
Create and publish instead of leaving as
draft.

options.name: --pre
options.description: Create as pre-release instead of stable.

options.name: --merge
options.description:
Allow merging this upload with an existing
release.

options.name: --releaseName
options.description: A custom name for the release.

options.name: --tag
options.description: A custom tag for the release.

options.name: --targetCommitish
options.description:
A commitish value for tag (branch or commit
SHA).

commands.name: github
commands.description: Upload releases to a GitHub repository.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [
default: Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [
default: linux]

options.name: --repoUrl
options.description:
Full url to the github repository (eg.
'https://github.com/myname/myrepo').

options.name: --token
options.description: OAuth token to use as login credentials.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Network timeout in minutes. [default: 30]

options.name: --publish
options.description:
Create and publish instead of leaving as
draft.

options.name: --pre
options.description: Create as pre-release instead of stable.

options.name: --merge
options.description:
Allow merging this upload with an existing
release.

options.name: --releaseName
options.description: A custom name for the release.

options.name: --tag
options.description: A custom tag for the release.

options.name: --targetCommitish
options.description:
A commitish value for tag (branch or commit
SHA).

commands.name: local
commands.description: Upload releases to a local path or network share.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [
default: Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [
default: linux]

options.name: --path
options.description: Target file path to copy releases to/from.

options.name: --keepMaxReleases
options.description:
The maximum number of releases to keep in
the target directory, anything older will
be deleted.

options.name: --regenerate
options.description:
Force regenerate the
releases.{channel}.json file in the target
directory.

commands.name: s3
commands.description: Upload releases to a S3 bucket.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
Output directory for created packages. [
default: Releases]

options.name: --channel
options.description:
The channel to use for this release. [
default: linux]

options.name: --keyId
options.description: Authentication identifier or access key.

options.name: --secret
options.description: Authentication secret key.

options.name: --region
options.description: AWS service region (eg. us-west-1).

options.name: --session
options.description: Authentication session token.

options.name: --endpoint
options.description:
Custom S3-compatible service url
(backblaze, digital ocean, etc).

options.name: --bucket
options.description: Name of the S3 bucket.

options.name: --prefix
options.description: Prefix to the S3 url.

options.name: --disablePathStyle
options.description:
Disable the default of path-style endpoint
and use a subdomain endpoint instead.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Network timeout in minutes. [default: 30]

options.name: --keepMaxReleases
options.description:
The maximum number of releases to keep in
the bucket, anything older will be deleted.

options.name: --vhelp
options.description: Show help (-h) or extended help (-H).

options.name: --legacyConsole
options.description:
Disable console colors and interactive
components.

options.name: --yes
options.description:
'yes' by instead of 'no' in non-interactive
prompts.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print diagnostic messages.

options.name: --skip-updates
options.description: Skip update checks
